---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Use Case

What problem would this solve, and who would benefit from it?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe how you think it should work.

## Alternatives Considered

List any workarounds or alternative approaches you have tried.

## Hardware Or Service Context

If relevant, include speaker model, firmware, source service, and any known
constraints.
